title: Vintage & Used Guitar Shops in Greater Austin
subtitle: Specialists, boutiques, acoustics, and chains across the metro

popup.title: Greater Austin's guitar retail map
popup.subtitle: A tour of vintage specialists, boutiques, and chains
popup.body: Austin's reputation as the Live Music Capital sustains an unusually dense guitar retail scene — 9 shops mapped here, ranging from a flagship vintage dealer on Red River to big-box chains, a boutique living-room showroom, and an acoustic-only specialist on West 35th.

popup.title: Austin Vintage Guitars
popup.subtitle: 4306 Red River St · Hyde Park corridor
popup.body: Austin's flagship dedicated vintage shop, under the same ownership since the late 1990s. Inventory skews toward pre-CBS Fenders, vintage Gibsons, period-correct amps, and effects — with Reverb listings that reach buyers nationwide. Full repair bench on-site.

popup.title: South Austin Music
popup.subtitle: 1402 S Lamar Blvd · South Austin
popup.body: Austin's longest-running independent guitar shop — on the same South Lamar corner since 1986. Known for a treasure-hunt mix of characterful mid-range instruments, used American Fenders, quirky off-brand finds, and in-house repairs. Lessons available.

popup.title: Austin Guitar House
popup.subtitle: 1104 E 12th St · East Austin
popup.body: A boutique living-room showroom focused on high-end and luthier-built electrics and amps. The place to try boutique brands rarely found elsewhere in Austin — premium PRS-style electrics, custom builds, and boutique valve amps starting at the low-thousands.

popup.title: Fiddler's Green Music Shop
popup.subtitle: 1809 W 35th St · Bryker Woods
popup.body: Austin's dedicated acoustic specialist — a snug shop curating higher-end flattops, mandolins, and banjos. The go-to for bluegrass, old-time, and Americana players who want to compare boutique and luthier-built instruments in a focused environment rather than a general-purpose store.

popup.title: Moon Music Pro
popup.subtitle: 2210 W Anderson Ln · North Central
popup.body: The newest independent on this map — opened its physical door in 2022 after starting as an online shop in 2019. Quickly earned a reputation for personalized service, competitive setups, fair trade-ins, and a wide price range from beginner-friendly used gear to professional instruments.

popup.title: The full picture
popup.subtitle: Two Strait Music locations, two Guitar Centers, and more
popup.body: Beyond the shops spotlighted here, the map also plots Strait Music's Bee Caves Rd and North Austin locations — full-line family-owned stores with strong used sections — and both Guitar Center outlets, which carry the metro's highest-volume pre-owned inventory for mainstream brands.
